name: Qin, the Vermin
description:
STAR TALES

Aboard your small but reliable space vessel, you’ve noticed strange sounds echoing beneath the floor plates—rapid scampering and skittering that shouldn't be there. Something else is aboard, hidden in the shadows, infesting your ship like a verminous pest. As the noises grow louder and the eerie sense of an unwelcome presence intensifies, it becomes clear that this creature must be dealt with. Armed with only your wits, a handy Lazer pistol and whatever repair tools are available, it’s high time you hunt down the intruder and reclaim your vessel before it festers beyond control
creator: Huxley  2000
